channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [REMSONSIND] Remsons Industries Board Meeting on May 22, 2026
item.description:
Remsons Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 22, 2026, to approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26 and formulating the Remsons Employees Stock Option Plan 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026.

  • Board to approve FY26 audited financial results on May 22, 2026.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY26.
  • Formulation of Remsons Employees Stock Option Plan 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REMSONS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WARRENTEA] Warren Tea: Equity Shareholder Meeting on June 18, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Warren Tea Ltd. will hold a meeting of equity shareholders on June 18, 2026, at 11:30 AM via video conferencing, as per the NCLT order. The meeting addresses the amalgamation of Warren Tea with Maple Hotels & Resorts. Remote e-voting starts on June 15, 2026, and ends on June 17, 2026. The notice and explanatory statement were sent to shareholders on May 18, 2026.

  • Warren Tea equity shareholders meet on June 18, 2026, via VC.
  • Meeting addresses amalgamation with Maple Hotels & Resorts.
  • Remote e-voting: June 15-17, 2026.
  • Notice sent to shareholders on May 18, 2026.
  • Cut-off date for e-voting is December 31, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WARREN TEA LTD.-$ | Category: Merger

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries Approves FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd's board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved exploring acquisition opportunities, including a potential purchase of a production unit from United Spirits Limited for ₹22.50 Crores. Other key decisions include exploring business opportunities in West Bengal, reviewing the group's expansion strategy, monetizing surplus land, and appointing a new Secretarial Auditor.

  • Approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Considering acquisition of United Spirits Limited's Gopalpur unit for ₹22.50 Crores.
  • Exploring additional alco-beverage manufacturing unit acquisitions.
  • Appointed Ms. Neha Poddar as Secretarial Auditor.
  • Reviewed expansion strategy with 8.40 million IMFL/IML case capacity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries Approves Audited Results, Eyes Acquisitions
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company is exploring acquisition opportunities, including a potential purchase of a production unit from United Spirits Limited for ₹22.50 Crores. The board also reviewed expansion strategies and is considering monetizing surplus land. Additionally, Neha Poddar was appointed as the Secretarial Auditor.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Considering acquisition of United Spirits Limited unit in Odisha for ₹22.50 Crores.
  • Exploring further alco-beverage manufacturing unit acquisitions across India.
  • Neha Poddar appointed as Secretarial Auditor, replacing M/s. Bhumika & Co.
  • Reviewing alco-beverage expansion strategy with significant licensed production capacities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ONMOBILE] OnMobile Appoints Leo Matthew Olebe as Independent Director
item.description:
OnMobile Global Ltd's Board of Directors approved the appointment of Leo Matthew Olebe as an Additional Director in the category of Independent Director, effective May 18, 2026, for a term of five years, subject to shareholder approval. Olebe brings 26 years of experience from Microsoft, Google, Meta, and Disney. He is currently a Venture Partner at Griffin and Co-Founder/President of a gaming studio. The appointment follows the recommendation of the Nomination and Compensation Committee.

  • Leo Matthew Olebe appointed as Additional Independent Director.
  • Appointment effective May 18, 2026, for a 5-year term, pending shareholder approval.
  • Olebe has 26 years of experience at Microsoft, Google, Meta, and Disney.
  • Olebe's appointment follows Nomination & Compensation Committee recommendation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OnMobile Global Ltd. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BLSE] BLS E-Services Reappoints Nangia & Co. as Internal Auditors
item.description:
BLS E-Services Ltd's Board has approved the re-appointment of M/s. Nangia & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants, as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. This decision was made during the board meeting held on May 18, 2026, where the board also approved the audited financial results for Q4 and the financial year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of 5% on equity shares. Additionally, the board approved entering into a Share Purchase Agreement for acquiring 100% equity shares of Atyati Technologies Private Limited for a revised consideration of ₹156.82 Crore.

  • Nangia & Co. LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Final dividend of 5% recommended for FY 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Standalone and consolidated audited financial results for FY 2026 approved.
  • Share Purchase Agreement approved for Atyati Technologies acquisition at ₹156.82 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLS E-Services Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [MUFIN] Mufin Green Finance Board Meeting on 21 May 2026
item.description:
Mufin Green Finance Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company has informed the BSE and NSE about this meeting in compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Mufin Green Finance board meeting is scheduled for May 21, 2026.
  • The board will consider and approve audited financial results.
  • Both standalone and consolidated results will be reviewed.
  • The results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mufin Green Finance Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DIGITIDE] Digitide Solutions Approves FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Digitide Solutions Ltd's Board of Directors approved the annual audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, as per Indian Accounting Standards (Ind-AS). The auditor's report has an unmodified opinion. The meeting, which commenced at 07:00 P.M and concluded at 08:50 P.M, also included a declaration under Regulation 33(3)(d) of the Listing Regulations signed by the CFO.

  • Board approved annual audited financial results for FY26.
  • Results are prepared as per Indian Accounting Standards (Ind-AS).
  • Auditor's Report has an unmodified opinion.
  • Declaration under Regulation 33(3)(d) of Listing Regulations enclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digitide Solutions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BAGFILMS] B.A.G. Films Receives Listing Approval for 98 Lakh Shares
item.description:
B.A.G. Films and Media Ltd. received final listing and trading approvals from BSE and NSE for 98,00,000 equity shares allotted to the Promoter Group on a preferential basis, following the conversion of warrants. The shares, with a face value of ₹2 each and a premium of ₹6.25 per share, were listed and admitted to dealings on the Exchange from May 19, 2026. The lock-in period for these shares extends until November 27, 2027.

  • B.A.G. Films received BSE and NSE approval for listing 98,00,000 equity shares.
  • Shares allotted to Promoter Group on a preferential basis after warrant conversion.
  • Listing effective May 19, 2026, with a face value of ₹2 and premium of ₹6.25 per share.
  • Lock-in period for the shares extends until November 27, 2027.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: B.A.G.FILMS & MEDIA LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ONMOBILE] OnMobile Global Re-appoints Ernst & Young as Internal Auditors
item.description:
OnMobile Global Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting on May 18, 2026, approved the re-appointment of M/s. Ernst & Young LLP, Chartered Accountants, as the Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. This decision was based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. The appointment is effective from April 1, 2026.

  • Ernst & Young LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 26-27.
  • Re-appointment effective from April 1, 2026.
  • Board's decision based on Audit Committee recommendation.
  • EY is a global leader in assurance, tax, transaction, and advisory services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OnMobile Global Ltd. | Category: Auditor
